title: mentha arvensis var. simplex
intro: Mentha arvensis var. simplex, also known as American wild mint, is a subspecies of the mint plant that is native to North America. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of American wild mint include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. American wild mint can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
